data.name: Password must be at least 8 characters.
data.value: Password must be at least 8 characters.

data.name: SettingsConcurrencyMessage
data.value: Concurrency conflict: the settings were modified by another user.

data.name: LeaveCountriesEmpty
data.value: Leave empty to make the method generally available.

data.name: ShippingRateTiersHelp
data.value: Rate tiers are evaluated by shipment mass and subtotal thresholds. Phase 1 keeps this as a simple admin-managed matrix without provider-specific live quoting.

data.name: ShippingMethodEditorIntro
data.value: Use this screen to manage carrier/service combinations and the rate tiers used by checkout and order shipping snapshots.

data.name: ShippingMethodConcurrencyMessage
data.value: Concurrency conflict. Reload and try again.

data.name: EmailChangeRequestedMessage
data.value: Email change requested. The user must confirm the new email before signing in.

data.name: PasswordResetEmailSendFailedMessage
data.value: Failed to send password reset email.

data.name: CommunicationOpsIntro
data.value: Operational visibility for communication readiness before full template and delivery-log tooling exists.

data.name: NoSmsWhatsAppActivityYet
data.value: No SMS or WhatsApp activity has been recorded yet.

data.name: SearchOrdersPlaceholder
data.value: Search by order number or currency

data.name: TaxSnapshotNote
data.value: Gross totals remain the operational source of truth, while this snapshot exposes the net/tax split currently persisted on the order.

data.name: ReturnSupportNote
data.value: Phase-1 returns support uses existing shipment and refund records. Returned parcels can be triaged here, while restock and deeper RMA workflow remain later-phase work.

data.name: InventoryAllocationSubtitle
data.value: Allocate reserved stock and finalize picking

data.name: InventoryAllocationNote
data.value: When allocation succeeds, the order transitions to Shipped (idempotent).

data.name: ReturnedShipmentFollowUpOpen
data.value: Returned shipment follow-up is open on this order.

data.name: ReturnedShipmentFollowUpNote
data.value: Use the shipment tab to confirm carrier state, then record the refund from this order.

data.name: UseRefundRestockFollowUp
data.value: Use refund and restock follow-up from this order.

data.name: BusinessesIntro
data.value: Create and maintain merchant tenants, owner assignments, and operational readiness.

data.name: SearchBusinessesPlaceholder
data.value: Search by business or legal name

data.name: SearchInvoicesPlaceholder
data.value: Search by id, order, customer, payment

data.name: InvoicesQueueIntro
data.value: CRM and order-generated invoices in one operational queue.

data.name: InvoicesTaxPolicyNote
data.value: This is a phase-1 VAT support surface for invoice review. It exposes current tax defaults and issuer identity without claiming full tax-engine automation or compliance completion.

data.name: RefundQueueIntro
data.value: Cross-order refund review for finance support and Stripe-first post-payment follow-up.

data.name: BusinessSupportQueueIntro
data.value: Unified onboarding, activation, invitation, and failed-email triage surface for support operators.

data.name: NoAttentionBusinessesQueued
data.value: No attention businesses are currently queued.

data.name: NoFailedEmailEventsQueued
data.value: No failed phase-1 email events are currently queued.

data.name: ApprovalChecklistRequirement
data.value: Approval and checklist must both be satisfied.

data.name: SetupIncompleteWarning
data.value: Setup is still incomplete. Finish owner assignment, primary location, legal name, and contact email before operational approval.

data.name: CustomerSegmentsIntro
data.value: Review CRM segmentation hygiene before campaigns, support filters, and reporting depend on it.

data.name: RefundWorkflowNote
data.value: Use refund when captured funds must be returned. Use void only if funds were not collected.

data.name: LinkedUserOwnershipNote
data.value: When a linked user is selected, contact data should be treated as identity-owned.

data.name: RecentSmtpAttempts
data.value: Recent SMTP-based transactional delivery attempts and failures.

data.name: NonEmailDeliveryHistory
data.value: Operator-facing history for live non-email delivery families.

data.name: CustomerConcurrencyMessage
data.value: Concurrency conflict. Reload the customer and try again.

data.name: InvoiceConcurrencyMessage
data.value: Concurrency conflict. Reload the invoice and try again.

data.name: LeadConcurrencyMessage
data.value: Concurrency conflict. Reload the lead and try again.

data.name: OpportunityConcurrencyMessage
data.value: Concurrency conflict. Reload the opportunity and try again.

data.name: SegmentConcurrencyMessage
data.value: Concurrency conflict. Reload the segment and try again.

data.name: WarehouseConcurrencyMessage
data.value: Concurrency conflict. Reload the warehouse and try again.

data.name: SupplierConcurrencyMessage
data.value: Concurrency conflict. Reload the supplier and try again.

data.name: StockLevelConcurrencyMessage
data.value: Concurrency conflict. Reload the stock level and try again.

data.name: StockTransferConcurrencyMessage
data.value: Concurrency conflict. Reload the stock transfer and try again.

data.name: PurchaseOrderConcurrencyMessage
data.value: Concurrency conflict. Reload the purchase order and try again.

data.name: BillingPlanConcurrencyMessage
data.value: Concurrency conflict. Reload the billing plan and try again.

data.name: PaymentConcurrencyMessage
data.value: Concurrency conflict. Reload the payment and try again.

data.name: FinancialAccountConcurrencyMessage
data.value: Concurrency conflict. Reload the financial account and try again.

data.name: ExpenseConcurrencyMessage
data.value: Concurrency conflict. Reload the expense and try again.

data.name: JournalEntryConcurrencyMessage
data.value: Concurrency conflict. Reload the journal entry and try again.

data.name: BusinessAdminTextOverridesJson
data.comment: Business-scoped admin UI wording overrides JSON.

data.name: BusinessCommunicationProfileNotFound
data.comment: Admin alert when business communication profile is missing.

data.name: EmailFlowRetriedSuccessfully
data.value: Email flow retried successfully using the current live target.
data.comment: Success message after retrying an email flow.

data.name: EmailTransportNotReadyForCommunicationTest
data.value: SMTP transport is not ready. Complete email settings before sending a communication test email.
data.comment: Error when email transport is not ready for a communication test.

data.name: CommunicationTestInboxNotConfigured
data.value: Communication test inbox is not configured. Add it in site settings before sending a test email.
data.comment: Error when communication test inbox is missing.

data.name: SmsTransportNotReadyForCommunicationTest
data.value: SMS transport is not ready. Complete SMS provider settings before sending a test SMS.
data.comment: Error when SMS transport is not ready for a communication test.

data.name: CommunicationTestSmsRecipientNotConfigured
data.value: Communication test SMS recipient is not configured.
data.comment: Error when communication test SMS recipient is missing.

data.name: WhatsAppTransportNotReadyForCommunicationTest
data.value: WhatsApp transport is not ready. Complete WhatsApp provider settings before sending a test message.
data.comment: Error when WhatsApp transport is not ready for a communication test.

data.name: CommunicationTestWhatsAppRecipientNotConfigured
data.value: Communication test WhatsApp recipient is not configured.
data.comment: Error when communication test WhatsApp recipient is missing.

data.name: AddOnGroupCreated
data.comment: Success message after creating an add-on group.

data.name: AddOnGroupNotFound
data.comment: Error when add-on group is missing.

data.name: AddOnGroupUpdated
data.comment: Success message after updating an add-on group.

data.name: AddOnGroupDeleted
data.comment: Success message after deleting an add-on group.

data.name: AddOnGroupDeleteFailed
data.comment: Error when deleting an add-on group fails.

data.name: AddOnGroupAttachProductsFailed
data.comment: Error when attaching an add-on group to products fails.

data.name: AddOnGroupAttachedToProducts
data.comment: Success message after attaching an add-on group to products.

data.name: AddOnGroupAttachedToCategories
data.comment: Success message after attaching an add-on group to categories.

data.name: AddOnGroupAttachedToBrands
data.comment: Success message after attaching an add-on group to brands.

data.name: AddOnGroupAttachVariantsFailed
data.comment: Error when attaching an add-on group to variants fails.

data.name: AddOnGroupAttachedToVariants
data.comment: Success message after attaching an add-on group to variants.

data.name: BrandCreated
data.comment: Success message after creating a brand.

data.name: BrandNotFound
data.comment: Error when brand is missing.

data.name: BrandUpdated
data.comment: Success message after updating a brand.

data.name: BrandConcurrencyConflict
data.value: Concurrency conflict. The brand was modified by another process. Please reload and try again.
data.comment: Error when brand edit has a concurrency conflict.

data.name: BrandDeleted
data.comment: Success message after deleting a brand.

data.name: BrandDeleteFailed
data.comment: Error when deleting a brand fails.

data.name: CategoryCreated
data.comment: Success message after creating a category.

data.name: CategoryNotFound
data.comment: Error when category is missing.

data.name: CategoryUpdated
data.comment: Success message after updating a category.

data.name: CategoryDeleted
data.comment: Success message after deleting a category.

data.name: CategoryDeleteFailed
data.comment: Error when deleting a category fails.

data.name: PageCreated
data.comment: Success message after creating a page.

data.name: PageNotFound
data.comment: Error when page is missing.

data.name: PageUpdated
data.comment: Success message after updating a page.

data.name: PageDeleted
data.comment: Success message after deleting a page.

data.name: PageDeleteFailed
data.comment: Error when deleting a page fails.

data.name: ValidationErrorsRetry
data.value: Please fix validation errors and try again.
data.comment: Warning shown when the user must correct validation errors before retrying.

data.name: PermissionsLoadFailed
data.comment: Error shown when the permissions list cannot be loaded.

data.name: PermissionCreateFailed
data.comment: Error shown when creating a permission fails.

data.name: PermissionCreated
data.comment: Success message after creating a permission.

data.name: PermissionNotFound
data.comment: Error shown when a permission cannot be found.

data.name: PermissionUpdateFailed
data.comment: Error shown when updating a permission fails.

data.name: PermissionUpdated
data.comment: Success message after updating a permission.

data.name: PermissionDeleteFailed
data.comment: Error shown when deleting a permission fails.

data.name: PermissionDeleted
data.comment: Success message after deleting a permission.

data.name: RoleCreateFailed
data.comment: Error shown when creating a role fails.

data.name: RoleCreated
data.comment: Success message after creating a role.

data.name: RoleNotFound
data.comment: Error shown when a role cannot be found.

data.name: RoleUpdateFailed
data.comment: Error shown when updating a role fails.

data.name: RoleUpdated
data.comment: Success message after updating a role.

data.name: RoleDeleted
data.comment: Success message after deleting a role.

data.name: RoleSystemProtectedDelete
data.value: This role is system-protected and cannot be deleted.
data.comment: Warning shown when attempting to delete a protected system role.

data.name: RoleDeleteFailed
data.comment: Error shown when deleting a role fails.

data.name: RolePermissionsLoadFailed
data.comment: Error shown when the role permissions editor cannot be loaded.

data.name: RolePermissionsUpdateFailed
data.comment: Error shown when saving role permissions fails.

data.name: RolePermissionsUpdated
data.comment: Success message after updating role permissions.

data.name: MediaUploaded
data.comment: Success message after uploading a media asset.

data.name: MediaAssetNotFound
data.comment: Error shown when a media asset cannot be found.

data.name: MediaUpdated
data.comment: Success message after updating a media asset.

data.name: MediaConcurrencyConflict
data.value: Concurrency conflict. Reload the media asset and try again.
data.comment: Error shown when a media asset update hits a concurrency conflict.

data.name: MediaDeleted
data.value: Media asset deleted from the library.
data.comment: Success message after removing a media asset from the library.

data.name: OrderNotFound
data.comment: Error shown when an order cannot be found.

data.name: OrderPaymentAdded
data.comment: Success message after adding an order payment.

data.name: OrderShipmentAdded
data.comment: Success message after adding an order shipment.

data.name: OrderRefundAdded
data.comment: Success message after adding an order refund.

data.name: OrderInvoiceCreated
data.comment: Success message after creating an order invoice.

data.name: ConcurrencyTokenMissing
data.comment: Error shown when a required concurrency token is missing.

data.name: OrderStatusUpdatedFormat
data.comment: Success message after changing an order status. Parameter 0 is the new status.

data.name: LoyaltyProgramCreated
data.comment: Success message after creating a loyalty program.

data.name: LoyaltyProgramNotFound
data.comment: Error shown when a loyalty program cannot be found.

data.name: LoyaltyProgramUpdated
data.comment: Success message after updating a loyalty program.

data.name: LoyaltyProgramDeleted
data.comment: Success message after deleting a loyalty program.

data.name: LoyaltyProgramDeleteFailed
data.comment: Error shown when deleting a loyalty program fails.

data.name: LoyaltyRewardTierCreated
data.comment: Success message after creating a loyalty reward tier.

data.name: LoyaltyRewardTierNotFound
data.comment: Error shown when a loyalty reward tier cannot be found.

data.name: LoyaltyRewardTierUpdated
data.comment: Success message after updating a loyalty reward tier.

data.name: LoyaltyRewardTierDeleted
data.comment: Success message after deleting a loyalty reward tier.

data.name: LoyaltyRewardTierDeleteFailed
data.comment: Error shown when deleting a loyalty reward tier fails.

data.name: LoyaltyAccountCreated
data.comment: Success message after creating a loyalty account.

data.name: LoyaltyCampaignsLoadFailed
data.comment: Error shown when loyalty campaigns cannot be loaded.

data.name: LoyaltyCampaignCreated
data.comment: Success message after creating a loyalty campaign.

data.name: LoyaltyCampaignNotFound
data.comment: Error shown when a loyalty campaign cannot be found.

data.name: LoyaltyCampaignUpdated
data.comment: Success message after updating a loyalty campaign.

data.name: LoyaltyCampaignActivated
data.comment: Success message after activating a loyalty campaign.

data.name: LoyaltyCampaignDeactivated
data.comment: Success message after deactivating a loyalty campaign.

data.name: LoyaltyCampaignActivationFailed
data.value: Failed to update loyalty campaign activation.
data.comment: Error shown when activating or deactivating a loyalty campaign fails.

data.name: LoyaltyAccountNotFound
data.comment: Error shown when a loyalty account cannot be found.

data.name: LoyaltyPointsAdjusted
data.comment: Success message after adjusting loyalty points.

data.name: LoyaltyAccountSuspended
data.comment: Success message after suspending a loyalty account.

data.name: LoyaltyAccountSuspendFailed
data.comment: Error shown when suspending a loyalty account fails.

data.name: LoyaltyAccountActivated
data.comment: Success message after activating a loyalty account.

data.name: LoyaltyAccountActivateFailed
data.comment: Error shown when activating a loyalty account fails.

data.name: LoyaltyRedemptionConfirmed
data.comment: Success message after confirming a loyalty redemption.

data.name: LoyaltyRedemptionConfirmFailed
data.comment: Error shown when confirming a loyalty redemption fails.

data.name: ProductCreated
data.comment: Success message after creating a product.

data.name: ProductNotFound
data.comment: Error shown when a product cannot be found.

data.name: ProductUpdated
data.comment: Success message after updating a product.

data.name: ProductConcurrencyConflict
data.value: Concurrency conflict: the record was modified by another user. Please reload and try again.
data.comment: Error shown when a product edit hits a concurrency conflict.

data.name: ProductDeleted
data.comment: Success message after deleting a product.

data.name: ProductDeleteFailed
data.comment: Error shown when deleting a product fails.

data.name: BusinessNotFound
data.comment: Error shown when a business cannot be found.

data.name: BusinessUpdated
data.comment: Success message after updating a business.

data.name: BusinessConcurrencyConflict
data.value: Concurrency conflict. Reload the business and try again.
data.comment: Error shown when a business edit hits a concurrency conflict.

data.name: BusinessSetupSaved
data.comment: Success message after saving business setup.

data.name: BusinessApproved
data.comment: Success message after approving a business.

data.name: BusinessSuspended
data.comment: Success message after suspending a business.

data.name: BusinessReactivated
data.comment: Success message after reactivating a business.

data.name: BusinessLocationCreated
data.comment: Success message after creating a business location.

data.name: BusinessLocationNotFound
data.comment: Error shown when a business location cannot be found.

data.name: BusinessLocationUpdated
data.comment: Success message after updating a business location.

data.name: BusinessLocationConcurrencyConflict
data.value: Concurrency conflict. Reload the location and try again.
data.comment: Error shown when a business location edit hits a concurrency conflict.

data.name: BusinessInvitationSent
data.comment: Success message after sending a business invitation.

data.name: BusinessInvitationReissued
data.comment: Success message after resending a business invitation.

data.name: BusinessInvitationRevoked
data.comment: Success message after revoking a business invitation.

data.name: BusinessMemberAssigned
data.comment: Success message after assigning a business member.

data.name: BusinessMemberNotFound
data.comment: Error shown when a business member cannot be found.

data.name: BusinessMemberUpdated
data.comment: Success message after updating a business member.

data.name: BusinessMemberConcurrencyConflict
data.value: Concurrency conflict. Reload the membership and try again.
data.comment: Error shown when a business membership edit hits a concurrency conflict.

data.name: BusinessMemberRemoved
data.comment: Success message after removing a business member.

data.name: BusinessMemberRemovedOverride
data.value: Business member removed under controlled owner override.
data.comment: Success message after removing a business member using owner override.

data.name: BusinessMemberActivationEmailSent
data.comment: Success message after sending a member activation email.

data.name: BusinessMemberActivationEmailFailed
data.comment: Error shown when sending a member activation email fails.

data.name: BusinessMemberEmailConfirmed
data.comment: Success message after marking a member email as confirmed.

data.name: BusinessMemberEmailConfirmFailed
data.comment: Error shown when confirming a member email fails.

data.name: BusinessMemberPasswordResetSent
data.comment: Success message after sending a member password reset email.

data.name: BusinessMemberPasswordResetFailed
data.value: Failed to send password reset email.
data.comment: Error shown when sending a member password reset email fails.

data.name: BusinessMemberAccountLocked
data.comment: Success message after locking a member account.

data.name: BusinessMemberAccountLockFailed
data.comment: Error shown when locking a member account fails.

data.name: BusinessMemberAccountUnlocked
data.comment: Success message after unlocking a member account.

data.name: BusinessMemberAccountUnlockFailed
data.comment: Error shown when unlocking a member account fails.

data.name: MobileOperationsSiteSettingsMissing
data.value: Site settings are missing. Configure system settings before relying on mobile operations diagnostics.
data.comment: Error shown when mobile operations diagnostics cannot run because site settings are missing.

data.name: CrmCustomersFootprintNote
data.comment: Summary note for the CRM customers total card.

data.name: CrmCustomerSegmentsCoverageNote
data.value: Available segmentation buckets across CRM operations.
data.comment: Summary note for CRM segment coverage on the customers workspace.

data.name: CrmCustomerPipelineNote
data.value: Live opportunity pipeline linked to current CRM customers.
data.comment: Summary note for pipeline context on the customers workspace.

data.name: CrmCustomerRecentInteractionsNote
data.value: Recent interaction signal across support and lifecycle work.
data.comment: Summary note for recent CRM interactions on the customers workspace.

data.name: CrmCustomerLinkedIdentityNote
data.value: Visible customer rows already linked to a platform identity.
data.comment: Operational note for linked-user customer rows.

data.name: CrmCustomerNeedsSegmentationNote
data.value: Current page rows without any CRM segment membership.
data.comment: Operational note for customers needing segmentation.

data.name: CrmCustomerOpportunityContextNote
data.value: Customers already carrying active opportunity context.
data.comment: Operational note for customers with opportunities.

data.name: CrmCustomerBusinessProfileNote
data.value: Visible business-profile customers in this queue slice.
data.comment: Operational note for business-profile customer rows.

data.name: CrmCustomerMissingVatNote
data.value: Business customers still missing VAT data for finance-safe follow-up.
data.comment: Operational note for business customers missing VAT data.

data.name: CrmOperatorPlaybooks
data.comment: Heading for CRM operator playbooks.

data.name: CrmNextStep
data.comment: Label for the recommended next step in CRM playbooks.

data.name: CrmCustomerLocaleFallbackPlaybookTitle
data.comment: Playbook title for CRM customers relying on locale fallback.

data.name: CrmCustomerLocaleFallbackPlaybookScopeNote
data.value: Rows using platform fallback culture usually need a linked identity locale or an explicit CRM locale decision before follow-up gets automated.
data.comment: Scope note for locale fallback customer playbook.

data.name: CrmCustomerLocaleFallbackPlaybookAction
data.value: Review linked-user coverage first, then clean up customer locale assumptions before support and lifecycle messaging rely on them.
data.comment: Operator action for locale fallback customer playbook.

data.name: CrmCustomerMissingVatPlaybookTitle
data.comment: Playbook title for business customers missing VAT data.

data.name: CrmCustomerMissingVatPlaybookScopeNote
data.value: Business tax profiles without a VAT ID usually indicate incomplete invoicing and compliance readiness for CRM billing follow-up.
data.comment: Scope note for missing VAT playbook.

data.name: CrmCustomerMissingVatPlaybookAction
data.value: Confirm the tax profile, collect the VAT ID, or downgrade the customer to consumer before invoices and finance operations depend on it.
data.comment: Operator action for missing VAT playbook.

data.name: CrmCustomerUnsegmentedPlaybookTitle
data.comment: Playbook title for customers without segment membership.

data.name: CrmCustomerUnsegmentedPlaybookScopeNote
data.value: Customers without segment membership are harder to target in lifecycle, support, and retention workflows.
data.comment: Scope note for unsegmented customer playbook.

data.name: CrmCustomerUnsegmentedPlaybookAction
data.value: Assign the customer to an existing segment or review whether CRM taxonomy needs a new segment before campaigns and support playbooks branch on segmentation.
data.comment: Operator action for unsegmented customer playbook.

data.name: CustomerFollowUpWorkspace
data.comment: Heading for the customer follow-up action card in the CRM editor.

data.name: CustomerFollowUpWorkspaceNote
data.value: Open the most common CRM follow-up lanes for this customer without leaving the current editing context.
data.comment: Supporting note for the customer follow-up action card in the CRM editor.

data.name: ReviewSegmentation
data.comment: Action label for reviewing customer segmentation context.

data.name: CreateOpportunity
data.comment: Action label for creating a CRM opportunity from customer context.

data.name: Loading
data.comment: Generic loading label.

data.name: LeadFollowUpWorkspace
data.comment: Heading for the lead follow-up action card in the CRM editor.

data.name: LeadFollowUpWorkspaceNote
data.value: Open the next lead remediation and conversion lanes without leaving the current lead editor.
data.comment: Supporting note for the lead follow-up action card in the CRM editor.

data.name: OpportunityFollowUpWorkspace
data.comment: Heading for the opportunity follow-up action card in the CRM editor.

data.name: OpportunityFollowUpWorkspaceNote
data.value: Open the linked customer and finance follow-up lanes for this opportunity from the same workspace.
data.comment: Supporting note for the opportunity follow-up action card in the CRM editor.

data.name: OpenCustomer
data.comment: Action label for opening a linked CRM customer.

data.name: InvoiceFollowUpWorkspace
data.comment: Heading for the invoice follow-up action card in the CRM editor.

data.name: InvoiceFollowUpWorkspaceNote
data.value: Open the linked customer, order, payment, and related invoice lanes for this invoice from the same workspace.
data.comment: Supporting note for the invoice follow-up action card in the CRM editor.

data.name: ReviewOrder
data.comment: Action label for opening the linked order review lane.

data.name: ReviewPaymentTrail
data.comment: Action label for reviewing the linked payment trail.

data.name: RelatedInvoices
data.comment: Action label for opening related invoices from the CRM invoice editor.

data.name: InvoiceStatusUpdatedMessage
data.comment: Success message after updating invoice status.

data.name: InvoiceStatusUpdateFailedMessage
data.comment: Error shown when invoice status update fails.

data.name: Qualified leads visible in this queue slice.
data.value: Qualified leads visible in this queue slice.

data.name: Rows that still need an explicit lead owner.
data.value: Rows that still need an explicit lead owner.

data.name: Leads not yet attached to a CRM customer record.
data.value: Leads not yet attached to a CRM customer record.

data.name: Leads already carrying linked customer context.
data.value: Leads already carrying linked customer context.

data.name: Visible leads with heavier interaction history needing review.
data.value: Visible leads with heavier interaction history needing review.

data.name: CrmLeadQualifiedPlaybookScopeNote
data.value: Qualified leads should either convert into customers quickly or be explicitly reclassified before the queue grows stale.

data.name: CrmLeadQualifiedPlaybookAction
data.value: Review ownership and customer linkage first, then convert the lead or push it back to a more realistic status.

data.name: CrmLeadUnassignedPlaybookScopeNote
data.value: Leads without owners usually drift because no operator is clearly accountable for next contact and conversion follow-up.

data.name: CrmLeadUnassignedPlaybookAction
data.value: Assign an owner before adding more interaction noise so the next follow-up is explicit.

data.name: CrmLeadUnconvertedPlaybookScopeNote
data.value: Leads without customer linkage block downstream opportunity, invoice, and retention workflows.

data.name: CrmLeadUnconvertedPlaybookAction
data.value: Convert the lead when the relationship is real, or clean up qualification assumptions before pipeline work builds on it.

data.name: Opportunity rows still active in the pipeline.
data.value: Opportunity rows still active in the pipeline.

data.name: Visible opportunities requiring near-term close-date review.
data.value: Visible opportunities requiring near-term close-date review.

data.name: High-value pipeline rows visible in the current slice.
data.value: High-value pipeline rows visible in the current slice.

data.name: Opportunities still missing an explicit owner.
data.value: Opportunities still missing an explicit owner.

data.name: Rows with heavier interaction trails that may need operator review.
data.value: Rows with heavier interaction trails that may need operator review.

data.name: CrmOpportunityClosingSoonPlaybookScopeNote
data.value: Near-term close dates need explicit review so the pipeline does not drift into silent misses.

data.name: CrmOpportunityClosingSoonPlaybookAction
data.value: Review the owner, latest interaction, and close-date realism before the opportunity ages past the expected window.

data.name: CrmOpportunityUnassignedPlaybookScopeNote
data.value: Pipeline rows without owners usually mean nobody is accountable for moving the deal forward.

data.name: CrmOpportunityUnassignedPlaybookAction
data.value: Assign an owner before adjusting stage or close date so responsibility is explicit.

data.name: CrmOpportunityHighInteractionPlaybookScopeNote
data.value: Heavy interaction trails often signal stalled negotiation, support confusion, or unclear next steps.

data.name: CrmOpportunityHighInteractionPlaybookAction
data.value: Read the recent interaction trail before adding more outreach, then tighten the next operator action.
